news.t: BlackRock's iShares drops the R from its BRIC ETF as it stops tracking Russian securities.

holdings.infoBox: BKF is an equity ETF with a total of 716 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tencent Holdings stock at 8.22%, Alibaba Group Holding at 5.31%, China Construction Bank at 2.18%, HDFC Bank at 2.09%, and Reliance Industries at 1.90%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI BIC ETF (BKF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI BIC index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of securities from the 'BIC' economies of Brazil, India, and China. BKF was launched on Nov 12, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock's iShares drops the R from its BRIC ETF as it stops tracking Russian securities.
data.text: BlackRock's iShares has ditched the "R" from its "BRIC" ETF as trading in Russian securities is now virtually impossible.
